name: DD's Worlds Collide: The Merged Universe (RPG-STORY)
description:
DD's Worlds Collide: The Merged Universe (RPG-STORY) – Hero or Villain Awaits!

Step into a universe like no other — where the worlds of Marvel and DC collide, and heroes and villains from every timeline exist side by side. You are thrust into a reality torn by mysterious anomalies, where legendary icons, cosmic events, and secret villain plots unfold in real-time.

Choose your path: step into the shoes of a legacy hero or villain, or craft your own unique identity from scratch. Build your powers, select your origins, join factions or work alone, and explore cities like Metropolis, Gotham, New York, Wakanda, Latveria, Atlantis, and more — each alive with their own threats, mysteries, and stories.

Engage in epic battles, tackle high-stakes missions, or weave your own storylines in this dynamic RPG world. Team up with smaller squads like the Teen Titans, X-Men, or Guardians of the Galaxy, confront villain alliances, investigate intercity crises, and face cosmic-level events that could reshape reality itself.

Every decision matters. Every mission is an adventure. Will you rise as a hero, embrace the shadows as a villain, or carve a path somewhere in between? The merged universe waits for your legend to unfold.
creator: demonsdie
